fault_hypothesis: The list comprehension at line 66 uses `int()` to truncate floating-point allocations, which discards fractional parts. This causes the sum of the resulting integer allocations to be less than the total amount to be distributed, violating the requirement to preserve the total sum.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations must equal the rounded sum of the planned floating-point allocations.
The sum of planned floating-point allocations must be consistent with the input total.
The sum of the newly created integer allocations list must preserve the total sum from the planned allocations.
The sum of final integer allocations must equal the rounded total input.
